Professional A-Frame Signs with Water-Resistant Durability & Custom Design Options PASTE INTO: Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Material Choice: Weather-Resistant Coroplast Signs Product Configuration: Complete A-Frame Kit with Hardware Quantity: Select Your Order Amount Size Options: Professional 36" x 24" Display Format Design Method: Choose Your Customization Approach Production Time: Select Your Turnaround Preference PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom Signicade A-Frame Kits for Outdoor Sidewalk Display

The Custom Signicade A-Frame Kit includes professional hardware and (2) 36" x 24" full-color signs designed for outdoor business advertising. Perfect for sidewalk displays, storefront marketing, and event promotion with water-resistant durability and maintenance-free operation.

Each A-frame features molded handles for easy transport and can be filled with water or sand for enhanced stability in outdoor conditions. The weather-resistant construction ensures long-lasting performance for retail locations, restaurants, real estate, and professional services.

Template Selection for A-Frame Sign Design

Choose from hundreds of professionally designed templates across multiple business categories including retail, restaurants, real estate, services, and events. Each template can be fully customized with your business information, colors, and branding.

File Upload Options for Custom A-Frame Signs

Upload your existing artwork files in vector formats (.eps, .pdf) or high-resolution raster files (.jpg, .tiff) up to 60MB. Our prepress team will optimize your files for professional outdoor display printing.

Professional Design Services for A-Frame Signage

Let our in-house graphic design team create custom A-frame signs tailored to your business needs. Provide your logo, images, and messaging requirements, and receive a professional proof for approval before production.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

A-Frame Material Options for Outdoor Business Advertising

Your Signicade A-frame kit includes professional-grade materials designed for outdoor business applications with weather-resistant performance.

Coroplast Sign Material for Weather-Resistant Display

4mm Coroplast Signs (2 included): Lightweight, waterproof plastic material ideal for outdoor advertising. Digitally printed with UV-resistant inks for fade-resistant outdoor performance. The corrugated plastic construction provides durability while remaining easy to handle and transport.

White Signicade Deluxe Hardware: Professional A-frame stand manufactured from high-impact plastic with molded handles for portability. Features fillable base chambers for water or sand stabilization in windy conditions.

Request a free sample packet of materials to evaluate quality before ordering.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

A-Frame Sign Finishing Options for Professional Display

Your custom A-frame signs include professional finishing designed for outdoor business advertising applications.

Standard A-Frame Sign Finishing

Each 36" x 24" sign is precision cut and finished with smooth edges for professional appearance. Signs are designed to fit securely in the Signicade frame channels without additional hardware.

Double-Sided A-Frame Printing Available

Standard A-frame kits include single-sided printing. For double-sided printed signs to maximize visibility from both directions, contact our customer service team for custom pricing and production options.

UV-Resistant Ink Application

All A-frame signs are printed with UV-resistant digital inks designed for outdoor durability and fade resistance in direct sunlight exposure.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

A-Frame Sign Production & Turnaround Times

Choose from flexible production timeframes designed to meet your business advertising schedule. Production times include both sign printing and A-frame kit assembly.

Express 2-Day A-Frame Production

Fast turnaround for urgent business advertising needs. Ideal when you need professional A-frame signs with minimal lead time.

  • Complete production within 2 business days
  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST processed next business day
  • Same-day rush available in select cases - contact customer service
  • Production begins upon file approval and payment processing

Standard 3-Day A-Frame Manufacturing

Our most popular production option combining speed with value. Free standard production timeframe for most business advertising applications.

  • Complete production within 3 business days
  • No additional rush charges
  • Ideal balance of speed and cost-effectiveness
  • Most popular choice for business advertising projects

Economy 5-Day A-Frame Processing

Cost-saving option when you have flexibility in your advertising timeline. Reduced pricing with extended production schedule.

  • Complete production within 5 business days
  • Discounted pricing for extended timeline
  • Perfect for planned advertising campaigns
  • Maximum cost savings on A-frame orders

Production Notes: Turnaround begins when artwork files are approved and payment is processed. Orders flagged in prepress or requiring proofs will begin production upon customer approval.

PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Payment Options for Custom A-Frame Orders

Secure payment processing for all A-frame sign orders with multiple convenient payment methods available.

Credit Card Processing for A-Frame Orders

We accept all major credit cards including Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover. Credit cards are charged upon order approval and production authorization.

Check Payment for A-Frame Business Orders

Business check payments accepted for A-frame orders. Checks must be received and cleared before production begins. View complete check payment guidelines for processing requirements.

Secure Payment Processing

All A-frame sign orders require payment before production begins. Your credit card will not be charged until you have reviewed and approved your order details, artwork, and specifications.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Guidelines for A-Frame Sign Delivery

Professional shipping options for A-frame kits with tracking and delivery confirmation included with all orders.

Standard Shipping Methods for A-Frame Hardware

Multiple shipping speeds available to meet your business advertising timeline:

  • Economy (5–10 Business Days): Cost-effective shipping for non-urgent orders
  • Standard (3–5 Business Days): Most popular shipping option
  • Three Day (3 Business Days): Expedited delivery
  • Two Day (2 Business Days): Fast delivery option
  • Overnight (1 Business Day): Next-day delivery when available

Shipping costs calculated by package weight and destination. Large A-frame orders may incur additional shipping charges due to size and weight requirements.

A-Frame Package Tracking & Delivery

Tracking numbers provided once A-frame packages ship. All shipping company terms apply for delivery schedules and package handling.

International Shipping for A-Frame Orders

International A-frame shipping available through USPS and UPS. Customers must provide shipping labels and customs documentation for international deliveries. Contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 for international shipping requirements.

Shipping Protection: Damaged A-frame products must be returned for replacement. Lost packages replaced after shipping carrier confirms loss, typically 7-10 business days after scheduled delivery.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Common Business Uses for Signicade A-Frame Signs

Professional A-frame signs serve multiple business advertising applications with portable, weather-resistant outdoor display capability.

Retail & Restaurant A-Frame Advertising

Sidewalk advertising for daily specials, promotions, store hours, and seasonal sales. Easy transport allows repositioning throughout the day for maximum customer visibility.

Real Estate A-Frame Applications

Open house advertising, property information display, and directional signage for real estate showings. Professional appearance enhances property marketing efforts.

Professional Services A-Frame Display

Law offices, medical practices, financial services, and consulting businesses use A-frames for office identification, service promotion, and professional advertising.

Event & Trade Show A-Frame Signage

Portable event advertising for conferences, trade shows, outdoor events, and community gatherings. Quick setup and professional appearance for temporary advertising needs.

Construction & Contractor A-Frame Signs

Job site advertising, safety messaging, and company identification for construction projects, landscaping services, and contractor applications requiring weather-resistant display.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Artwork Requirements for A-Frame Sign Printing

Professional artwork specifications ensure optimal print quality for outdoor A-frame sign display applications.

File Format Guidelines for A-Frame Signs

Vector-based files produce the highest quality A-frame sign printing. Recommended formats include:

  • .EPS files: Vector format with fonts converted to outlines
  • .PDF files: High-resolution vector or raster content
  • .JPG/.TIFF files: 300 DPI minimum resolution for 36" x 24" output

Maximum file upload size: 60MB. For larger files, contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 for alternative upload methods.

A-Frame Design Specifications

36" x 24" sign dimensions with 300 DPI resolution recommended for optimal outdoor display quality. Include 0.125" bleed area for precision cutting and finishing.

Color Matching Options for Professional A-Frame Display

For color-critical business branding, our Color Match Proof System ensures accurate color reproduction for A-frame signs. Contact customer service for color matching requirements and specifications.

Artwork Proof Process for A-Frame Orders

Order proofs available upon request, including low-resolution artwork preview, order summary with pricing, and billing/shipping confirmation. Production begins upon customer approval of proof materials.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Design & Order Your Custom A-Frame Signs Today

Professional Signicade A-frame kits provide everything needed for effective outdoor business advertising. Each complete kit includes weather-resistant hardware and two custom 36" x 24" signs designed for your specific business needs.

Why Choose Professional A-Frame Advertising

Immediate Visibility: Position your A-frame signs exactly where customers will see them - sidewalks, storefronts, parking areas, and high-traffic locations.

Weather-Resistant Durability: Coroplast sign material and impact-resistant hardware withstand outdoor conditions while maintaining professional appearance.

Portable Marketing Solution: Molded handles and lightweight construction allow easy repositioning throughout the day. Fill base with water or sand for wind stability.

Cost-Effective Advertising: Long-lasting outdoor advertising solution with no ongoing costs. Professional appearance enhances business credibility and customer attraction.

Complete A-Frame Kit Includes

  • White Signicade Deluxe A-frame hardware with fillable base
  • Two custom 36" x 24" full-color printed signs
  • Professional finishing for immediate outdoor use
  • Molded carrying handles for easy transport
  • Weather-resistant construction for outdoor durability

Start Your A-Frame Order: Choose from template designs, upload your existing artwork, or work with our professional design team. Production begins immediately upon artwork approval with flexible turnaround times to meet your advertising schedule.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About A-Frame Signs

What is included with the Signicade A-frame kit?

Each kit includes the white Signicade Deluxe A-frame hardware and two custom 36" x 24" full-color printed signs. The A-frame features molded handles for transport and a fillable base for stability.

Can I get double-sided printed A-frame signs?

Double-sided printing is available for A-frame signs. Contact our customer service team at (320) 391-5300 for double-sided pricing and production options.

How do I stabilize my A-frame in windy conditions?

The A-frame base can be filled with water or sand for added weight and wind resistance. This prevents tipping in outdoor conditions while maintaining portability when empty.

What file types work best for A-frame sign printing?

Vector files (.eps, .pdf) with fonts converted to outlines provide the highest quality. High-resolution .jpg or .tiff files at 300 DPI also work well for A-frame sign printing.

How weather-resistant are A-frame signs?

Coroplast sign material is waterproof and UV-resistant. The plastic A-frame hardware withstands outdoor conditions and requires no maintenance. Signs maintain color and durability in direct sunlight and weather exposure.

Can A-frame signs be used for indoor display?

A-frame signs work excellently for indoor applications including retail stores, lobbies, trade shows, and events. The professional appearance and portability make them ideal for both indoor and outdoor advertising.

What are the production times for A-frame orders?

Choose from 2-day express, 3-day standard (most popular), or 5-day economy production times. Production begins upon artwork approval and payment processing.

Do you ship A-frames internationally?

International shipping is available through USPS and UPS. Customers must provide shipping labels and customs documentation. Contact customer service for international shipping requirements.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
